title: Variables & Data Types
description: Learn how to store and work with data using variables. Understand JavaScript's dynamic typing system.
longDescription: Variables are like labeled boxes where you store information. In this chapter, you'll learn about the three ways to declare variables in JavaScript (var, let, const), understand different data types (strings, numbers, booleans, null, undefined), and discover best practices for naming and using variables.

summary.overview: Master the art of storing and manipulating data in JavaScript through variables.
whatYouWillLearn: How to declare variables using var, let, and const
The difference between primitive and reference types
